title: PersonCreated
description: Emitted when a new person is registered in the partner domain.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

personId.description: Unique identifier of the person aggregate.

name.description: Last name of the person (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

firstName.description: First name of the person (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

socialSecurityNumber.description: Swiss AHV number in formatted form (756.XXXX.XXXX.XX), or null if not provided.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). May be encrypted when encrypted=true.

encrypted.description: When true, PII fields (name, firstName, socialSecurityNumber, dateOfBirth) are Vault-encrypted per ADR-009.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was produced.
